name: Feature request

## Proposal

Describe the feature.

## Why It Fits The Project

Explain how the proposal improves local-first archiving, crawl reliability, or export quality.

## Expected User Benefit

Describe the concrete outcome for users.

## Possible Risks Or Tradeoffs

Describe any added complexity, compatibility risk, or schema impact.
